examples: I feel that he is kind of grouchy today.
Does your sweetheart seem grouchy and overwhelmed?
And if you're feeling grouchy today, may I suggest eating a strawberry.
America is perfectly set up for extroverts, which is one reason the introverted intellectual class feels alienated and grouchy.
Hard-pressed workers are feeling grouchy: workforce surveys report record levels of job dissatisfaction.
